# viettelidc_ovpc_security_group (Data Source)

Look up a ViettelIDC Security Group by id or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Security Group ID (vttSecurityGroupId). Mutually optional with name.
- `name` (String) Security Group name. Mutually optional with id.
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
